My Story

We Take Care of the Whole Body

Hi! I'm a proud Nana who discovered Amare and fell in love with everything it stands for. When I found products that truly worked — supporting my mind, my body, and my whole family's wellbeing — I knew I had to share them.

Amare is built on the science of the gut-brain axis — the powerful connection between your gut health and your mental wellness. Their products work from the inside out, literally.

Whether you're a busy mom, a grandparent, or anyone who wants to feel their best every single day — there is something here for you and your entire family.

🧬
Science-Backed Formulas
Gut-brain axis research & clinical studies
👨‍👩‍👧‍👦
The Whole Family
Products for kids, adults & seniors
🌿
Clean Ingredients
Natural, safe, and powerfully effective

Product Lines

Everything Your Family Needs to Thrive

Five powerful product lines. One mission: take care of your whole body — inside and out.

😊✨
⭐ Best Seller
Happy Juice & GBX Supplements

Amare's signature gut-brain nutrition system. Happy Juice is the #1 mental wellness drink — supporting mood, energy, and focus naturally. GBX delivers targeted nutrition for your whole body and mind.

🧒💜
For Kids
Kids Supplements

Give your littles the best start. Amare's kids line supports growing minds and bodies with clean, safe nutrition they'll actually love to take.

⚖️🌿
Weight Wellness
GBX Slim2Fit

A holistic approach to weight management working with your gut-brain connection. Not a diet — a lifestyle shift that feels amazing and truly lasts.

🌿💆
Hair Care
Rootist Hair Products

Healthy hair starts at the root. Rootist's clinically-studied formulas nourish your scalp and strands for visibly thicker, stronger, more beautiful hair.

✨🧖
Skincare
Skin to Mind™ Face Products

The first skincare line built on the skin-gut-brain connection. Feel the difference when your routine is backed by real science and real results you can see.
